# Chapter 8: Communications and digital infrastructure  (~100 pp)
- 8.1 Communications as civilization infrastructure (12) · 8.2 Internet at planetary scale (15) · 8.3 Submarine cables and the actual internet (15) · 8.4 Cellular networks (12) · 8.5 Satellites and orbital infrastructure (12) · 8.6 Algorithmic governance: who controls flow (15) · 8.7 Failure section: undersea cable cuts, single-points of failure, BGP at planetary scale, content-moderation as engineering (19)

**Archetype**: transport, scaling, ethics. **Project**: assess one digital service's planetary-scale failure modes. **Exercises**: 20.
